examples: It was the fortieth anniversary of the death of the composer.
Today is his mother's fortieth birthday.
I took it on her mother's fortieth birthday.
Under shariah compliant finance, 2.5 percent, or one-fortieth, of the assets of the financial instrument have to be donated each year to zakat.
On Feb. 5 a projected 145 million viewers will watch the Pittsburgh Steelers and the Seattle Seahawks square off in the fortieth Super Bowl.
